dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S3656 IS: To designate the portion of Interstate Route 680 in Omaha, Nebraska, as the “Hal Daub Freeway”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Mrs. Fischer (for herself and Mr. Ricketts) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Environment and Public Works

form.official-title: To designate the portion of Interstate Route 680 in Omaha, Nebraska, as the Hal Daub Freeway.

subsection.text: The portion of Interstate Route 680 located in Omaha, Nebraska, beginning at mile post 0 and ending at the Missouri River, shall be known and designated as the Hal Daub Freeway.

Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the portion of Interstate Route 680 referred to in subsection (a) shall be deemed to be a reference to the Hal Daub Freeway.
